posts.text: Property records still live in county silos that nobody can verify. Put ownership, liens, and title history on-chain and truth becomes programmable. Verifiable property data is the foundation for a real on-chain economy of physical assets.
This is exactly why we need privacy-first property tokenization. The fix is separating the digital identity of an asset from the physical owner, not exposing county records to the whole world.

references.author: Property Wonk
references.text: Deed and title fraud keeps happening because county property records are siloed and forgeable. We need a verifiable, on-chain chain of ownership for every home, so title history and liens become programmable truth instead of a clerk's paper promise.
